title: Desmodium floribundum
taxonomy: Desmodium floribundum is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea family. It is a legume native to tropical Africa. The plant is classified into the genus Desmodium, which includes over 200 species of vines and shrubs. The genus Desmodium is further grouped into the subfamily Faboideae, a large group of plants that includes beans, peas, and other legumes. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other legumes.
